title: Let There Be You
epigraph: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God created he him.
styleNote: Modern Creation Anthem · From Starlight to Soul
listenLine: Press play and hear creation call your name.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Before the sound, before the sky
There was only breath and light
A voice so soft, it cracked the dark
And stars woke up with beating hearts

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He drew the oceans, carved the shore
Hung galaxies like open doors
Each colour born from endless flame
And every spark knew His name

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But the greatest line He ever drew
Was the silhouette that turned to you

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Let there be you —
A fire in the mirror, a light breaking through
The breath of the heavens, alive in a frame
A soul spun from starlight and called by name
Let there be love
Let there be truth
Let there be all of this beauty in you

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: The earth was tuned in sacred chords
A song of grace from formless chords
Mountains rose like quiet prayers
And time was held in folded air

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: But of all He made, and all He knew
He saved the final spark for you

sections.label: Chorus 2
lines: Let there be you —
A flame in the silence, a dream made new
The image of heaven with breath in your chest
A masterpiece made from dust and rest
Let there be hope
Let there be truth
Let there be God breathing life into you

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Ooh, you were always the plan
Carved in the palm of His hand
The stars, they shine — but not like you

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Let there be you —
A world within wonder, a soul breaking through
The echo of Eden, the whisper of Him
The light that begins where stories begin
Let there be love
Let there be truth
Let there be all of His glory in you

sections.label: Outro
lines: Let there be…
you.
